author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
STARSEEKER – Release Date Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
STARSEEKER lands on Nintendo Switch 2 on June 11, 2026! 

Discover deep space with your crew in this new game set within the Astroneer universe. Complete planet-wide objectives across multiple star systems, but make sure to watch out for the unknown perils of space! 

#NintendoSwitch2 #STARSEEKER 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Tales of Arise – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Challenge your fate in Tales of ARISE - Beyond the Dawn Edition, out now on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/tales-of-arise-beyond-the-dawn-edition-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Wield the Blazing Sword alongside a mysterious, untouchable girl and your companions in a quest for liberation! Experience the story of the divided Renan and Dahnan people looking to create a new future. In "Beyond the Dawn," explore the world again with additional scenarios and gameplay. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #TalesofArise 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Splatoon 3 North American League Show 2026 – Episode 8
Episode 8 of the Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Show is here! Check the updated season standings as we advance further into the tournament. #Splatoon3NAL2026

Tune in to this week's Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Event #8 livestream on Saturday, May 23 at 4pm PT here: https://www.youtube.com/live/OaDDXbJN27s

Interested in competing? Register here: https://battlefy.com/nintendovs/splatoon3-north-american-league/?utm_source=Events&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=N1122-01&utm_id=N1122-01

Catch up on previous episodes and livestreams here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2JiZAV5BmDXkhjMHRXksU8m6-1y3LUbi

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Membership auto-renews after initial term at the then-current price unless canceled. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply. nintendo.com/purchase-terms/

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: www.nintendo.com/us/whatsnew/splatoon-3-north-american-league-2026/
